templates.name: Claude Code Sandbox
templates.description: Hardened Debian dev container with Claude Code CLI, CodeGraph (wired to Claude Code), and frontend (Vue/React/Tailwind) VS Code extensions.

templates.name: Codex Sandbox
templates.description: Hardened Debian dev container with OpenAI Codex CLI, CodeGraph (wired to Codex), and frontend (Vue/React/Tailwind) VS Code extensions.
